classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.time.TimeRole
documentation: fmt: off

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.time.TimeZoneOffsetAdapter
documentation: Time Zone Offset is described in minutes, mesh format in 15-minute increments.

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.time.TAIUTCDeltaAdapter
documentation: TAI-UTC Delta is described in seconds encoded in signed integer, mesh format in signed integer with different offset

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.time.UncertaintyAdapter
documentation: TAI-UTC Delta is described in seconds encoded in float, mesh format is in centiseconds

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.time.TimeOpcode
documentation: fmt: off

Property IDs available in mesh:
"Mesh Device Properties v2"
https://www.bluetooth.com/specifications/specs/mesh-device-properties-2/
Format specification:
"GATT Specification Supplement v6"
https://www.bluetooth.org/docman/handlers/DownloadDoc.ashx?doc_id=539729

functions.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.util.EmbeddedBitStruct
documentation:
Emulates BitStruct embedding:
    - for parsing, adds Computed accessor fields to the parent construct,
    - for building, Rebuild the bit struct using keys passed to the parent

NOTE: This is a hack. Do not use unless you absolutely have to.

variables.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.NetworkRetransmit
documentation: (Network Retransmit Interval Steps + 1) * 10ms

variables.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.RelayRetransmit
documentation: (Relay Retransmit Interval Steps + 1) * 10ms

variables.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.PublishRetransmit
documentation: (Publish Retransmit Interval Steps + 1) * 50ms

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.AddressType
documentation: fmt: on

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.RetransmitAdapter
documentation: fmt: on

methods.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.KeyIndicesAdapter._decode
documentation:
Flatten a list dictionaries into list of items:
    [{first=1, second=2}, {last=3}] -> [1, 2, 3]

methods.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.KeyIndicesAdapter._encode
documentation:
Expand a list into list of dictionaries:
    [1, 2, 3] -> [{first=1, second=2}, {last=3}]

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.PublishPeriodStepResolution
documentation: fmt: on

classes.name: bluetooth_mesh.messages.config.ConfigOpcode
documentation: fmt: on
